full_description: use the specified hand to move the briefly marked can onto the colored target pad
schema: {A} denotes the can, {B} denotes the colored target pad, and {C} denotes the specified hand.
preference: Mention the specified hand and colored target pad, but do not imply multiple cans or multiple stages.
seen: Use {C} to move the marked {A} onto {B}.
Use {C} to place the highlighted {A} on {B}.
With {C}, pick up the marked {A} and put it on {B}.
Use {C} to follow the brief marker and place the selected {A} on {B}.
unseen: Use {C} to place the flashed {A} onto {B}.
With {C}, move the briefly signaled {A} onto {B}.
Use {C} to transfer the highlighted {A} to {B}.
Use {C} to pick the selected {A} and set it on {B}.
